title: lolium mairei
intro: Lolium mairei, also known as French meadow-grass or meadow grass, is a perennial grass species native to Europe, primarily found in the mountainous regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lolium mairei include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Lolium mairei is often used as an ingredient in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used topically to apply its medicinal properties to the skin.
